decisions.decision: [PROTOCOL] Literature-standards protocol adopted.
decisions.context: company/protocols/literature-standards.md. Codifies what already runs in finance-research-experiments: pre-registration before compute (§1 -- PROTOCOL commit predates results commit); FDR budget per campaign (§2 -- Benjamini-Hochberg at pre-declared q, usually q=0.10; no p-hacking, no post-hoc metric selection, no double-dipping data, no post-freeze retuning); reproducibility (§3 -- fixed seeds, versioned artefacts, commit SHAs on every result, venv'd runs); honest negatives (§4 -- Phase AC canonical; every negative to company/rd/findings/); product-side experiments (§5 -- F013 30d approval-rate as worked example); citation discipline (§6 -- real authors + year + venue + DOI/URL); peer review (§7 -- external triggers on whitepapers/investment-grade claims/named-alternative-method comparisons); non-negotiables that pull a claim (§9). CTO owns reproducibility audit; Research Lead owns pre-reg + FDR enforcement; Legal owns citation + non-negotiables enforcement. Codified as escalation.md §6 (suppression of a research negative) and review-chain.md §7b (research conditional stage gated by research_relevant:true).
